questionHtml: Using an externalities diagram, explain how “greater access to education” for girls in Pakistan could reduce market failure (paragraph [5]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

The vertical axis may be price, but could be costs or benefits. The horizontal axis is quantity. P and Q is sufficient. A title is not necessary.

meta.title: Using an externalities diagram, explain how “greater access to education” for girls in Pakistan could reduce market failure (paragraph [5]).
